response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack and web/cloud developer (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) but does not meet the core requirements of this embedded security role. Native-level Japanese is mandatory and is not listed (languages are English, Romanian, basic German). C experience is limited to a ~6-month stint at National Instruments roughly a decade ago, with no evidence of UNIX/Linux kernel modification, embedded firmware, L2/L3 networking, switch chips, or security technologies such as MACsec or 802.1X.
strengths: 10+ years of professional software development experience, well above the 3-year minimum
Some prior C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on a developer-tooling product
Strong engineering discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and Linux familiarity
concerns: No Japanese language ability listed; role requires native-level Japanese
No embedded, firmware, LAN-switch, or Linux-kernel modification experience
No demonstrated background in network security (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal) or L2/L3 networking
